3166960.name: Armageddonica
3166960.description:
Humanity has fallen - and the angels did nothing.
Now, the heavens burn as dire gods wage war across creation. The deeper you fight, the more reality frays. Trust no side. Read between the lines. The forbidden Gospel of Judas whispers a hidden truth… one that could unravel the cosmos itself.

Armageddonica is a post-apocalyptic dark fantasy where you command vast, self-managing armies through the visceral control of a hack-and-slash ARPG hero. It’s strategy without the stress - built for players who want to lead from the front, not just click from afar.

Our hybrid gameplay formula fuses brutal hero combat with RTS depth. Command troops, manage resources, build bases, and shape your army’s composition - all without drowning in high-APM micromanagement. Your Champion levels up, unlocks devastating abilities, and can turn the tide of battle… but no hero wins a war alone.

  • Hybrid RTS + ARPG – Directly control your hero while leading autonomous armies in relentless, large-scale battles.

  • Strategy Without Stress - Gamepad-friendly RTS design. Make the big calls without micro-managing every unit.

  • Champion Progression – Level up, unlock powerful skills, and influence the outcome of entire battles.

  • Fast-Paced Missions - Procedural campaign of 10-30 min battles, each with unique tactical challenges.

  • Deep Lore - A world built on the heretical Gospel of Judas, where divine war hides a darker truth.

Armageddonica revolutionizes the ARPG genre by making your character's power truly matter on a massive scale. This isn't just another dungeon crawler - it's the evolution of action RPGs where your hero's strength, equipment, and tactical choices command entire armies.

True ARPG Innovation:

  • Meaningful Builds: Every stat, skill point, and piece of gear affects both your combat prowess and army effectiveness

  • Visceral Combat: Direct hack-and-slash control with the weight of commanding legions

  • Scaling Power Fantasy: Watch your character progression translate into battlefield dominance

  • Deep Customization: mix champion classes and shared spells into unstoppable combos, Vampire Survivors-style.

  • combos, Vampire Survivors-style.

Beyond Traditional ARPGs: Your sword impacts not only your own combat, but also boosts your army’s morale and performance. Your armor protects both you and allies on the front line, while tactical spells help coordinate effective, large-scale attacks.

This is the ARPG experience you've been waiting for: where becoming powerful means becoming a true warlord.

This game is ideal for:


The ARPG Warlord - For players who want to be the tip of the spear, leading from the front. See your builds shape entire battlefields.

The Relaxed Commander - Players who love strategy but prefer a laid-back pace, where you can enjoy building and leading armies without the stress of frantic clicks or high APM.

The Build Theorist - Players who love deep character customization and want to experiment with how different builds affect not just combat, but army composition and tactics.
3166960.supported_languages:
英语*, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
